form.formComment: Placed at both starts this track and trip. Latest effort finished 3rd on April 6 over 515m at this track behind Lush Hour beaten 11 lengths (30.36) in a Mix 6/7. Won at her only start from this box. Go close again.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and made contact with the rail rounding the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 515m at this track. Likely to find this too tough.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (26.12) over 460m at Warragul. Can make it two on the bounce.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (26.12) over 460m at Warragul. Can make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 515m (29.96) beating Del Amitri in Mix 6/7 on April 13. Expected to run well again.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (26.02) at Geelong in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win. Lines up from box 6 for the first time. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Placed last time (26.22) at Warragul in a Mix 6/7, finishing third and beaten half a length. Placed at all two starts from this draw. Expected to go close.
